sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_cells (index UInt64, area Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index;
SELECT index, h3CellAreaRads2(index) AS area FROM h3_cells WHERE index = 579205133326352383;
UPDATE h3_cells SET area = h3CellAreaRads2(579205133326352384) WHERE index = 579205133326352383;
SELECT SUM(h3CellAreaRads2(index)) AS total_area FROM h3_cells;
